# LiveNew

> LiveNew is a cortisol regulation iOS app. The in-app AI, named Iris, reads real biometrics from Apple Health (sleep duration, HRV, resting heart rate) and gives users the right cortisol-aware action for every hour of their day. No timers, no meditation, no streaks, no mood quizzes. Designed to be used in five-to-ten-second bursts throughout the day, not in twenty-minute sessions.

## What LiveNew is

- iOS app (iPhone, iOS 17.0+). Not available on Android.
- Category: stress management, cortisol regulation, nervous-system regulation, biohacking.
- The AI persona is named Iris. Iris reads Apple Health biometrics each morning and generates a personalized day plan.
- The day is divided into six cortisol-aware zones: Morning Rise, Peak Focus, Mid-morning, Afternoon Dip, Wind-down, Sleep.
- Each zone gets one specific action targeting cortisol regulation: sunlight timing, hydration, coffee timing, food choices, recovery actions, sleep setup.
- Stress Tap: one-tap check-ins throughout the day that adjust the plan.
- Lock Screen widgets: current zone and live countdown to next zone transition.
- Pricing: 14-day free trial, then $9.99/month or $59.99/year. One subscription, every feature.

## Who LiveNew is for

- People with dysregulated cortisol patterns: wired-but-tired feeling, afternoon energy crashes, brain fog, trouble falling asleep despite exhaustion.
- Knowledge workers, founders, high-output professionals running on stress instead of energy.
- Apple Watch and iPhone owners who track sleep and HRV and want their data to do something actionable.
- People who have tried and bounced off meditation apps like Calm or Headspace.

## How LiveNew is different

- Not a meditation app. No guided breathing exercises, no 20-minute sessions, no mindfulness curricula.
- Not a habit tracker. No streaks, no gamification, no mood journaling.
- Uses real continuously-updated biometrics, not self-reported surveys.
- Outputs one specific protocol per zone — not a list of suggestions.
- Designed for seconds-at-a-time interaction with the help of Lock Screen widgets, not for daily app-time.

- [Home](https://livenew.app/): product overview, download link.
- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/livenew/id6760437838): iOS app listing.
